description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
Check out our other social media and product links:
https://linktr.ee/shedflips

Selling online is an emotional roller coaster — and we're talking about the highs, the lows, the cloud-9 days, and the 24-hour droughts that make you wonder if you'll ever sell anything again.

In this 29-minute Thursday-afternoon vlog Lonnie and Candice get real about the emotional swings of full-time eBay reselling — the cloud-9 days, the days where the inbox sits silent, and how to manage feelings when sales drive your livelihood. Then they pull and pack the day's orders: a wide spread including a vintage Lucite purse a buyer asked them to double-box, a Louisville Slugger bat that sold TWICE in one day, a $64.99 set of 14 Program Classics books originally bought for $10 at a garage sale, the $49-take-a-low-offer-then-regret Merrell hikers, and the Shed Flops stretch where Lonnie can't bring himself to throw a Fontanini Mary figurine in the trash.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
00:00 The Emotional Rollercoaster of Selling Online
05:30 Thursday Pull Begins (DeWalt Tile Blade + Pink Lady Cookbook)
08:30 Magnets, Stanley Cup, Lancome Makeup + Faux-Marble Bookends

17:30 More Army Clothing + 4 Stanley Cups + Manga Set
19:40 Merrell Hiking Shoes ($49 Regret)
21:25 David Copperfield + Transformers Ultra Magnus
22:25 Shed Flops: Bush + Astros Hats, Liberty + Mallard Buckles
27:25 The Fontanini Mary We Can't Throw Out

Thanks for hanging out in the shed with us. If you like watching real reselling life as it happens, subscribe and we'll see you in the next one. And if you want to get your name in the outro credits, the Shed Heads channel membership is $1.99/month — link below.
